input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8771 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.apache.maven:maven-core:2.0.7; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: Existing 2.0.6 tests use constructor signatures for ArtifactResolutionException and ArtifactNotFoundException that differ in 2.0.7, so generated fixes must adapt to the resolved 2.0.7 API rather than add setup.

Tests that execute full Maven builds or remote artifact resolution may become network- or local-repository-dependent; prefer isolated temp projects and avoid requiring remote repositories for coverage.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: maven-core 2.0.7 resolves the Maven 2 core, Plexus, ClassWorlds, Wagon, artifact, project, model, and diagnostics APIs transitively; normal unit-style coverage can exercise CLI, diagnostics, model/project, and Plexus-backed code without extra dependencies, Docker, or required environment setup.
